Tests the behavior of Math.floor with negative infinity in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.floor` function when applied to negative infinity. The assertion verifies that `Math.floor(-Infinity)` returns `-Infinity`, which is the expected behavior according to the ECMAScript specification. This code provides narrow functionality as it focuses on a specific mathematical operation and its expected result. It is likely part of a larger test suite intended to validate the correctness of mathematical functions in a JavaScript environment.
